content: Hi, I'm looking for some new books to read. I've been so busy with work lately.
What kind of books are you in the mood for?

I'm not sure, I've been listening to a lot of music lately and I think I'd like something that combines my love of music with a good story. I've been working as a park ranger at Yellowstone and I'm actually planning to move to Melbourne, Australia soon.
That sounds like a great combination! There are some excellent books about music and nature out there. Have you considered 'The Song of the Dodo' by David Quammen?
No, I haven't. I'll have to check it out. I've been meaning to get back into reading more, but it's hard to find the time. I've been taking care of my rabbit, Coco, and she's been keeping me busy.
Wow, you must be very dedicated to your pet. Do you have a favorite book or author that you always come back to?
Yeah, I love Jane Austen. I've read all of her books and I'm always excited to see what new adaptations come out. I've even got a signed copy of 'Pride and Prejudice' that I treasure.
That's amazing! A signed copy of 'Pride and Prejudice' must be very valuable. Have you ever thought about writing your own book?
Ha! I don't think so, I don't think I'm a good enough writer. But I do love skiing and I've even won a few local competitions.
That sounds like a great hobby! Skiing can be very exhilarating. Do you have a favorite type of music that you like to listen to while you ski?
Yeah, I love listening to electronic music. There's something about the beat that just works for me. I've even started learning how to DJ and I'm planning to perform at a local club on December 15th.
That's impressive! You must be very talented. Have you ever thought about sharing your music with others?
Actually, I've been thinking about starting a YouTube channel to share my music and DJing tips. I've even registered the domain name 'uttonmixes.com' and I'm planning to launch it on January 1st.
That's a great idea! A YouTube channel can be a wonderful way to share your passion with others. Do you have any plans for how you'll promote your channel?
Yeah, I've been thinking about using social media to promote my channel. I've already got a pretty big following on Instagram and I think I can use that to drive traffic to my channel.
That's a great idea! Social media can be very effective for promoting a channel. I see you're moving to Melbourne, Australia, are you excited about the move?
It was nice chatting with you, Sutton.
